evidence.claim: The system manages runway slots for both arriving and departing aircraft.
evidence.fact: This system assigns departure and arrival slots while enforcing a minimum separation interval between consecutive uses of the same runway.
evidence.user_story_span: The system manages runway slots for both arriving and departing aircraft.
evidence.fact_span: This system assigns departure and arrival slots while enforcing a minimum separation interval between consecutive uses of the same runway.

evidence.claim: The system allows arrival flights to be given priority over departure flights when allocating slots.
evidence.fact: Arrivals have priority over departures when competing for the same slot.
evidence.user_story_span: arrival flights to be given priority over departure flights when allocating slots
evidence.fact_span: Arrivals have priority over departures when competing for the same slot.

evidence.claim: The system runs the slot allocation process when the interaction occurs.
evidence.fact: When an emergency is declared, the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.

evidence.claim: The system reassigns the departure flight to the next available slot.
evidence.fact: When a runway is closed, the system reassigns its future flights to the other runway.
evidence.user_story_span: reassigns the departure flight to the next available slot
evidence.fact_span: reassigns its future flights to the other runway
